content: respx 0.23.1 is a pytest/httpx mocking library that intercepts httpx requests at the transport level. It supports both sync and async httpx clients. Key usage: @respx.mock decorator or respx.mock() context manager. Routes are matched with respx.post('https://api.github.com/...') and return values set with .mock(return_value=httpx.Response(201, json={...})). respx works with both AsyncClient and Client. The library allows pattern matching (URL, method, headers, JSON body). It integrates naturally with pytest-asyncio. Main advantage over pytest-httpx: more expressive route DSL with chaining. Main limitation: needs careful route setup — unmatched routes raise respx.patterns.NetworkError by default.
